message:
fix(ci): set fail-fast: false so jobs complete independently

macOS has a pre-existing asupersync compilation issue (u32/usize
type mismatches). With the default fail-fast: true, this cancels
the passing Ubuntu and Windows jobs. Setting fail-fast: false
ensures each platform runs to completion independently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,6 +8,7 @@ on:
 jobs:
   rust:
     strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
       matrix:
         os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest]
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
